versions.version_description: Lady Gaga, Ariana Grande - Rain On Me https://youtu.be/ugQhauUEcJM. Capo 4th fret. Suggestions are welcome.

tuning: E A D G B E
content:
[Verse 1: Lady Gaga]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]          [ch]G[/ch]
I didn't ask for a free ride[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]         [ch]C[/ch]
I only asked you to show me a real good time[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]       [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
I didn't ask for the rainfall[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]               [ch]G[/ch]            [ch]C[/ch]
At least I showed up, you showed me nothing at all[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
(Ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh) It's coming down on me[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
(Ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh) Water like misery[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
(Ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh) It's coming down on me[/tab]
[tab] [ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]
(Ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh-ooh) I'm ready, rain on me[/tab]


[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Rain. On. Me.[/tab]


[Post chorus]
[ch]Am[/ch] [ch]F[/ch] [ch]C[/ch] [ch]G[/ch]   x2


[Verse 2: Ariana Grande]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]          [ch]F[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
Living in a world where no one’s innocent[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]        [ch]C[/ch]
Oh but at least we try[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]            [ch]F[/ch]                 [ch]C[/ch]        [ch]G[/ch]
Gotta live my truth not keep it bottled in[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]     [ch]G[/ch]
So I don’t lose my mind, Baby[/tab]


[Pre-Chorus]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
I can feel it on my skin[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
It’s coming down on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Teardrops on my face[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Water like misery[/tab]
[tab]       [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]     [ch]C[/ch]
Let it wash away my sins[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
It’s coming down on me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Let it wash away[/tab]

[Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Rain. On. Me.[/tab]


[Post Chorus]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
  Rain On Me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]      [ch]F[/ch]      [ch]C[/ch]
Rain On Me, Oh Yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]   [ch]F[/ch]  [ch]C[/ch]
Rain On Me[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
Rain On Me[/tab]


[Bridge]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Rain On Me, Ooh[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]F[/ch]
Hands up to the sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]C[/ch]            [ch]Am[/ch]
I’ll be your galaxy, I’m about to fly[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]           [ch]G[/ch]
Rain On Me, Tsunami[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Hands up to the sky[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]            [ch]G[/ch]       [ch]Am[/ch]           [ch]F[/ch]
I’ll be your galaxy, I’m about to fly[/tab]


[Final Chorus]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]C[/ch]      [ch]G[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab]    [ch]Am[/ch]        [ch]F[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]
I'd rather be dry, but at least I'm alive[/tab]
[tab]     [ch]Am[/ch]     [ch]F[/ch]
Rain on me, rain, rain[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Rain. On. Me.[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I hear the thunder coming down[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Won’t you rain on me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
Eh Yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]         [ch]F[/ch]              [ch]G[/ch]
I hear the thunder coming down[/tab]
[tab]          [ch]C[/ch]       [ch]G[/ch]
Won’t you rain on me[/tab]
[tab]   [ch]C[/ch]
Eh Yeah[/tab]
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]    [ch]F[/ch]   [ch]C[/ch]
Rain. On. Me.[/tab]
